title: FinancialLiteracyChatbotState
description: Complete conversation state for the financial literacy chatbot. The orchestrator owns this object and updates it after every analyzer pass.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this conversation session.

consent_acknowledged.description: True when the user confirms they understand this chatbot provides educational guidance only.

profile.description: Baseline employment and financial context collected in Phase 1.

pay_frequency.description: How often the user receives a paycheck.

goal.description: The user's selected financial topic and planning horizon.

primary_goal.description: The financial topic the user wants to explore.

time_horizon.description: short_term = < 6 months, medium_term = 6–24 months, long_term = 2+ years.

budget.description: Budget and cash-flow evidence. Populated when primary_goal is budget_cashflow.

fixed_expenses.description: Total monthly fixed expenses (rent, utilities, subscriptions, insurance) in USD.

variable_expenses.description: Total monthly variable expenses (food, entertainment, transport) in USD.

credit.description: Credit management evidence. Populated when primary_goal is credit_management.

apr.description: Annual percentage rate on the user's primary credit card or debt, as a percentage (e.g., 22.99).

balance.description: Current outstanding credit card or revolving debt balance in USD.

due_date.description: Payment due date as a day of the month (e.g., '15') or a full date string.

retirement.description: Workplace 401(k) evidence. Populated when primary_goal is workplace_401k.

employer_match.description: Employer match formula or percentage (e.g., '100% up to 6%', '50% up to 4%').

contribution_rate.description: Current or planned employee contribution rate as a percentage of salary.

loan.description: Student loan evidence. Populated when primary_goal is student_loans.

interest_rate.description: Annual interest rate as a percentage.

payment_amount.description: Current monthly payment amount in USD.

plan_generated.description: Set to true by the orchestrator after Phase 4 plan generation completes.

selected_next_action.description: The concrete next action the user commits to during Phase 5.

artifacts.description: Tracks which artifacts have been generated.
